About Shining Legacy

A GTA commercial cleaning company built on the belief that every business deserves a spotless, professional environment.

Our Story

Built on Trust. Delivered with Excellence.

Shining Legacy Commercial Cleaning Inc. was founded with a clear mission: to provide GTA businesses with the calibre of cleaning service they truly deserve — reliable, thorough, and always consistent.

We understand that a clean workspace is not a luxury — it is a direct reflection of your brand, a factor in employee health and productivity, and a signal of professionalism to every client you receive.

That is why we invest in continuous training, premium eco-friendly products, and a standard of service that goes beyond what most cleaning companies deliver. We are not just another cleaning crew. We are your long-term partner in maintaining an exceptional workplace.

Get Free Quote
What Drives Us

Our Core Values

Reliability You Can Count On

We show up on time, every time. Your cleaning schedule is our commitment — not a suggestion. Our clients never have to wonder if the job will get done.

Uncompromising Quality

Every detail matters. We do not rush through a clean — we follow systematic processes that ensure a consistent, high-standard result on every visit.

Eco-Responsible Practices

All our cleaning products are WHMIS-compliant, eco-certified, and non-toxic. Good for your people, safe for the planet, and effective on the toughest commercial messes.

Respect for Your Space

We treat your business as if it were our own. Discreet, professional, and trustworthy — especially in sensitive environments like medical offices and financial institutions.

Client-First Service

Your satisfaction is not a metric — it is our standard. We listen, adapt, and follow up to ensure every clean meets your expectations and our own high bar.

Local GTA Expertise

We know the GTA, Durham, and Clarington business environment. Our local roots mean better response times, genuine accountability, and a team that genuinely cares about your community.

How We Work

Our Cleaning Process

A structured, consistent approach that delivers predictable, professional results every time.

1

Assessment

We visit or discuss your facility in detail to understand your specific needs, schedule preferences, and any specialized requirements.

2

Custom Plan

We build a cleaning program tailored to your facility type, size, and frequency — with transparent, itemized pricing. No hidden fees.

3

Professional Service

Our trained cleaning professionals arrive fully equipped with eco-friendly, WHMIS-compliant products and industry-grade tools.

4

Follow-Up

We check in after every clean to confirm your satisfaction and address any specific notes for the next visit. Continuous improvement is built into every contract.
